programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to swap parenting roles for the day, and it proves to be a shock to each kid's system; Jay gives business advice to an overzealous entrepreneur; Cameron is bedridden with the flu, leaving Mitchell torn about some tickets.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay's before heading out to Alex's graduation, but Jay is busy trying to hide a botox mishap; Cameron is upset with Mitchell; Phil tries to sympathize with Claire on her impending breakdown over the kids growing up too fast.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay wants nothing more than a quiet birthday spent fishing on his own, but the family scrambles to put together a big celebration; Claire and Mitchell wind up trapped; Phil runs into his old college nemesis; Cameron gets into some hot water.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Donning cow boots and hats, the family heads to Jackson Hole, Wyoming for some outdoor fun where they attempt cattle herding, skeet shooting and horseback riding; Jay finds himself duped into a face-off with a cowboy named Hank.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam plan a special evening for the family in order to announce their intentions to adopt another child, but Lily makes it known she doesn't want another baby in the house; Claire and Jay consume themselves with proving a point.
